fair_claims_settlement_practices.description: NY unfair claims settlement practices — 25 enumerated; Regulation 64.

provisions.title: Unfair Claims Settlement
provisions.requirement: 25 enumerated unfair claims settlement practices are prohibited.

provisions.title: Regulation 64
provisions.requirement: Detailed unfair settlement practices regulation.

no_fault.description: NY Comprehensive Motor Vehicle Insurance Reparations Act — $50K basic economic loss; serious injury threshold.

provisions.title: Basic Economic Loss
provisions.requirement: Basic economic loss up to $50,000.

provisions.title: Serious Injury Threshold
provisions.requirement: Tort suit requires serious injury threshold under §5104.

provisions.title: 30-Day No-Fault Payment
provisions.requirement: No-fault benefits must be paid within 30 days.

total_loss_regulations.description: NY total loss settlement; ACV, comparables; DMV salvage requirements.

provisions.title: Total Loss Settlement
provisions.requirement: Total loss settlement procedures under Regulation 64.

provisions.title: ACV and Comparables
provisions.requirement: ACV determination and comparable vehicle requirements.

time_limits_and_deadlines.description: Critical time limits for New York auto claims.

required_disclosures.description: Mandatory disclosures for NY auto claims.

disclosures.title: Claim Form and Instructions
disclosures.requirement: Claim form and instructions under 11 NYCRR 216.4(b).

provisions.title: Mandatory SUM
provisions.requirement: Supplementary UM/UIM mandatory — $25K/$50K minimum.

anti_fraud_provisions.regulation_reference: NY Penal Law §176.05–.30; NYIL §405, §409; NICB referral best practices
anti_fraud_provisions.description: NY insurance fraud degrees, fraud warning, SIU reporting, and NICB/NISS referral guidance.

provisions.title: Insurance Fraud
provisions.requirement: Insurance fraud degrees under NY Penal Law §176.05–.30.

provisions.title: Fraud Warning Statement
provisions.requirement: Fraud warning required under NYIL §405.

provisions.title: SIU Reporting
provisions.requirement: SIU reporting under NYIL §409.

provisions.title: NICB Theft and Salvage Referral
provisions.requirement: Submit NICB referrals for suspected vehicle-theft rings, fraudulent salvage rebuild activity, or VIN-switch schemes, including claim file chronology and title-chain documentation.
provisions.reference: NICB Theft and Salvage Fraud Referral Guidance

provisions.title: NISS Cross-Carrier Referral
provisions.requirement: Refer suspected coordinated fraud activity involving multiple carriers through NISS to identify linked participants and prior suspicious claims across carriers.

repair_standards.description: NY shop choice (Freedom of Choice); aftermarket parts disclosure.

provisions.title: Freedom of Choice
provisions.requirement: Claimant has right to choose repair shop.

provisions.title: Aftermarket Parts Disclosure
provisions.requirement: Aftermarket parts must be disclosed per NYIL §2610(b).

prohibited_practices.title: 25 Prohibited Acts
prohibited_practices.description: NYIL §2601 enumerates 25 prohibited unfair claims practices.

rental_car_coverage.description: NY total-loss rental period; rental coverage.

provisions.title: Total-Loss Rental Period
provisions.requirement: Rental period for total loss under NYIL §3411(g).

provisions.title: Rental Provisions
provisions.requirement: 11 NYCRR 216.7(b)(4) governs rental coverage.

provisions.title: Mandatory Arbitration
provisions.requirement: No-fault disputes subject to mandatory arbitration.

subrogation_rules.description: NY generally follows made-whole doctrine. Collateral source adjusted since 2009.

provisions.title: Made Whole Doctrine
provisions.requirement: NY generally follows made-whole doctrine.

provisions.title: Collateral Source
provisions.requirement: CPLR §4545 governs collateral source rule (adjusted since 2009).

comparative_fault.description: NY follows pure comparative fault — claimant can recover reduced by fault percentage; no bar threshold.

provisions.title: Pure Comparative Fault
provisions.requirement: Claimant can recover reduced by fault percentage; no 51% bar.

statute_of_limitations.description: New York statute of limitations for auto claims.
